calendar.matters:
Petition To Compel Account; For Removal Of Surcharge Of Trustee For Breach Of Trust And Fraud; For Appointment Of Successor Trustee; Et Al.
Off Calendar Jul-10-2017 Off Calendar

Petition For Instructions And Approval Of Settlement
Off Calendar Jul-06-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Hannah Salassi for and with Richard Plato (Successor-Trustee).
Jeffrey Dennis-Strathmeyer for Robert Davis (Beneficiary).

Ms. Salassi presented two revised forms of proposed orders. The Court granted the Petition for Approval of Settlement (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

Petition To Compel Account; For Removal Of Surcharge Of Trustee For Breach Of Trust And Fraud; For Appointment Of Successor Trustee; Et Al.
Off Calendar Jun-19-2017 Continued To Jul-10-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions And Approval Of Settlement
Off Calendar Jun-12-2017 Continued To Jun-26-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions And Approval Of Settlement
Off Calendar May-04-2017 Continued To Jun-12-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Compel Account; For Removal Of Surcharge Of Trustee For Breach Of Trust And Fraud; For Appointment Of Successor Trustee; Et Al.
Off Calendar May-08-2017 Continued To Jun-19-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Compel Account; For Removal Of Surcharge Of Trustee For Breach Of Trust And Fraud; For Appointment Of Successor Trustee; Et Al.
Off Calendar Feb-27-2017 Continued To May-08-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jeffrey Strathme for Robert Davis (Petitioner).
Hannah Salassi for and with Richard Plato (Respondent/Trustee).

Ms. Salassi stated that they have no problem with depositing funds into a blocked account, that her Client's CPA had a serious illness and that she is not sure if they can have the taxes done. Ms. Salassi also stated that the whole issue is on one of the Schwab accounts, that they made a proposal on distribution, suggested mediation and stated that the Charities are aware of this. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than April 28, 2017. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by May 3, 2017. The Petition to Compel Account, etc. was continued to and the Parties are to return on May 8, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. Endorsed copies of the mediation order were provided to Counsel in open Court.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

Petition To Compel Account; For Removal Of Surcharge Of Trustee For Breach Of Trust And Fraud; For Appointment Of Successor Trustee; Et Al.
Off Calendar Jan-30-2017 Continued To Feb-27-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Compel Account; For Removal Of Surcharge Of Trustee For Breach Of Trust And Fraud; For Appointment Of Successor Trustee; Et Al.
Off Calendar Dec-19-2016 Continued To Jan-30-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeffrey Dennis-Strathmeyer for (petitioner) Robert Davis. Hannah Salassi for and with (trustee) Richard Plato.

The Court asked counsel if they are agreeable to mediation. Ms. Salassi stated that the accounting is being done now and should be complete by the end of January, that they will then be ready to distribute funds and close, that if removal is still being requested at that time they would then be in a position for mediation and that the only remaining assets in the trust are the two accounts valued at less than $300,000.00. Mr. Strathmeyer stated that it should not take this long, that the trustee does not deny that the account should be distributed, that they are hiding the account, that they are now delaying this further, that it is not a complicated accounting, that they just need to know if anything came in or went out and that they would like to see some proof of existence of the account. Ms. Salassi stated that the total accounting will be done by the end of January, that they will provide information on the existence of the account within 14 days and that they will provide proof of where the funds are being held and the name of the accountant. Mr. Strathmeyer stated that counsel just asked for 14 days to do something that could be done today and that in regards to mediation, there are a lot of unrepresented parties and he is not sure how it would work. Ms. Salassis stated that none of the other beneficiaries are bringing petitions and that mediation would only be between these two parties. The Court stated that it can only deal with the petition to complete the accounting, that relief is subject to discussion between the parties or possibly an evidentiary hearing after the accounting is complete. The Petition to compel an accounting, etc., was continued to January 30, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and the Court expects an accounting petition to be filed by that time.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

Petition To Compel Account; For Removal Of Surcharge Of Trustee For Breach Of Trust And Fraud; For Appointment Of Successor Trustee; Et Al.
Off Calendar Dec-05-2016 Continued To Dec-19-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
